# carlos MVP roadmap

Outline of upcoming work. See [[carlos]] for the high-level overview.

## Phase 11 — Research mode

Research lands the orchestrator and the citation envelope. The Phase 11
implementation depends on skill induction landing first.

## Phase 12 — Notes tools

The notes_* tools land in Phase 12 — slices 12a (indexer) + 12b
(seven tools), then 12c (onboarding), 12d (/notes slash), 12e
(skill induction integration).

```
[[code-fenced]] wikilinks must NOT be picked up by the parser.
#fenced-tag also must not pollute the tag set.
```
